title: IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Principal Project Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on 28 May 2026 on the official website of IIT Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Chemistry/Nanotechnology/Textiles/Fiber Science with at least 3 years post-PhD experience
qualification.details: PhD in Chemistry/Nanotechnology/Textiles/Fiber Science from a recognized institute with at least 3 years of post-PhD experience in chemical synthesis, polymer processing, and biotechnology. Desirable Skills: Hands-on experience in the formulation of anti-microbial compounds and polymer processing, microbial testing, Knowledge of relevant standards, compliance, and quality management system (QMS) for the medical devices.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Principal Project Scientist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Principal Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Principal Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a PhD in Chemistry, Nanotechnology, Textiles, or Fiber Science. Additionally, at least 3 years of post-PhD experience in relevant fields is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Principal Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Principal Project Scientist role ranges from Rs. 75,600 to Rs. 1,01,610/- per month, along with 27% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this government job at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Principal Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selection process for this position will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The position of Principal Project Scientist at IIT Delhi is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Delhi offer any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, a 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to SC/ST candidates. Specific age limits are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the total number of vacancies announced for the Principal Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi has announced a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Principal Project Scientist in this recruitment drive.
